cases.prompt: /laravel-agent:laravel-filament Product resource with name, price, category relationship and Shield permissions
cases.expect: forks the laravel-filament agent and scaffolds a Filament Resource with form/table schema, relation, and Shield-based RBAC

cases.prompt: /laravel-agent:laravel-filament Build an admin panel for managing orders and customers
cases.expect: forks the laravel-filament agent and proposes a multi-resource Filament panel plan

cases.prompt: /laravel-agent:laravel-filament Add a stats overview widget to the existing dashboard
cases.expect: forks the laravel-filament agent and scaffolds a Filament stats widget class
